2604.11790.title: ClawGuard: A Runtime Security Framework for Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Against Indirect Prompt Injection
2604.11790.paper_summary: Tool-augmented Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated impressive capabilities in automating complex, multi-step real-world tasks, yet remain vulnerable to indirect prompt injection. Adversaries exploit this weakness by embedding malicious instructions within tool-returned content, which agents directly incorporate into their conversation history as trusted observations. This vulnerability manifests across three primary attack channels: web and local content injection, MCP server injection, and skill file injection. To address these vulnerabilities, we introduce \textsc{ClawGuard}, a novel runtime security framework that enforces a user-confirmed rule set at every tool-call boundary, transforming unreliable alignment-dependent defense into a deterministic, auditable mechanism that intercepts adversarial tool calls before any real-world effect is produced. By automatically deriving task-specific access constraints from the user's stated objective prior to any external tool invocation, \textsc{ClawGuard} blocks all three injection pathways without model modification or infrastructure change. Experiments across five state-of-the-art language models on AgentDojo, SkillInject, and MCPSafeBench demonstrate that \textsc{ClawGuard} achieves robust protection against indirect prompt injection without compromising agent utility. This work establishes deterministic tool-call boundary enforcement as an effective defense mechanism for secure agentic AI systems, requiring neither safety-specific fine-tuning nor architectural modification. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/Claw-Guard/ClawGuard.
2604.11790.paper_summary_zh: 增強工具的大型語言模型（LLM）代理在自動化複雜的多步驟現實世界任務方面展現了令人印象深刻的能力，但仍然容易受到間接提示注入的攻擊。對手利用這一弱點，將惡意指令嵌入工具返回的內容中，這些內容被代理直接納入其對話歷史，作為可信的觀察結果。這一漏洞主要表現為三個攻擊渠道：網頁和本地內容注入、MCP伺服器注入，以及技能檔案注入。為了解決這些漏洞，我們提出了\textsc{ClawGuard}，一種新穎的運行時安全框架，在每個工具調用邊界強制執行用戶確認的規則集，將不可靠的依賴於對齊的防禦轉變為一種確定性、可審計的機制，攔截對手的工具調用，防止任何現實世界的影響產生。通過在任何外部工具調用之前，自動從用戶聲明的目標推導出特定任務的訪問約束，\textsc{ClawGuard}在不修改模型或改變基礎設施的情況下，阻止了所有三條注入途徑。在AgentDojo、SkillInject和MCPSafeBench上的五個最先進的語言模型實驗表明，\textsc{ClawGuard}在不妨礙代理效用的情況下，實現了對間接提示注入的強大保護。這項工作確立了確定性的工具調用邊界強制執行作為安全代理AI系統的有效防禦機制，無需特定的安全微調或架構修改。代碼可在https://github.com/Claw-Guard/ClawGuard公開獲得。
2604.11790.author: Wei Zhao et.al.
2604.11790.authors: Wei Zhao, Zhe Li, Peixin Zhang, Jun Sun
